author: Abdul Goni
title: Limbless protesters held a rally earlier this month demanding the interim government support those injured in the protests -- with some of the first receiving prosthetic limbs on Thursday | National News | kulr8.com
text: Limbless protesters held a rally earlier this month demanding the interim government support those injured in the protests -- with some of the first receiving prosthetic limbs on Thursday - Abdul Goni - Updated Tags As featured on Squeezing rubber-covered robotic prosthetic hands, Bangladesh protesters wounded during the deadly revolution to topple autocratic leader Sheikh Hasina test out replacement arms for their lost limbs. Local Weather Weather Alert ...WINTER WEATHER ADVISORY IN EFFECT FROM 2 AM TO 5 PM MST SUNDAY... * WHAT...Snow expected. Total snow accumulations of 1 to 3 inches. * WHERE...A portion of south central Montana. * WHEN...From 2 AM to 5 PM MST Sunday. * IMPACTS...Plan on slippery road conditions and reduced visibilities. * ADDITIONAL DETAILS...Heaviest snowfall is expected Sunday morning...mainly west and southwest of Billings. PRECAUTIONARY/PREPAREDNESS ACTIONS... Slow down and use caution while traveling.
